# Quick Label Reference for Manual Creation

## URL to Create Labels
https://github.com/Mostafa-SAID7/TUXIMO/labels

## Instructions
1. Click "New label" button
2. Copy-paste the name, color (without #), and description from below
3. Click "Create label"
4. Repeat for all 16 labels

## Labels to Create (Copy-Paste Ready)

### Label 1
- **Name**: documentation
- **Color**: 0075ca
- **Description**: Documentation changes

### Label 2
- **Name**: source
- **Color**: 1d76db
- **Description**: Source code changes

### Label 3
- **Name**: components
- **Color**: 5319e7
- **Description**: Component changes

### Label 4
- **Name**: styles
- **Color**: d876e3
- **Description**: Style/CSS changes

### Label 5
- **Name**: typescript
- **Color**: 0052cc
- **Description**: TypeScript changes

### Label 6
- **Name**: configuration
- **Color**: fbca04
- **Description**: Configuration file changes

### Label 7
- **Name**: github-actions
- **Color**: 000000
- **Description**: GitHub Actions workflow changes

### Label 8
- **Name**: scripts
- **Color**: c5def5
- **Description**: Script changes

### Label 9
- **Name**: assets
- **Color**: bfdadc
- **Description**: Asset file changes

### Label 10
- **Name**: tests
- **Color**: d4c5f9
- **Description**: Test file changes

### Label 11
- **Name**: seo
- **Color**: 0e8a16
- **Description**: SEO related changes

### Label 12
- **Name**: security
- **Color**: b60205
- **Description**: Security related changes

### Label 13
- **Name**: data
- **Color**: fef2c0
- **Description**: Data file changes

### Label 14
- **Name**: hooks
- **Color**: c2e0c6
- **Description**: React hooks changes

### Label 15
- **Name**: ui
- **Color**: e99695
- **Description**: UI component changes

### Label 16
- **Name**: dependencies
- **Color**: 0366d6
- **Description**: Dependency updates

## Checklist
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] source
- [ ] components
- [ ] styles
- [ ] typescript
- [ ] configuration
- [ ] github-actions
- [ ] scripts
- [ ] assets

- [ ] seo

- [ ] dependencies

## After Creating All Labels
✓ Verify all 16 labels exist at https://github.com/Mostafa-SAID7/TUXIMO/labels
✓ Proceed to Task 3.2: Re-enable labels in dependabot.yml
